coreTruthSet.description: Authority is reframed as alignment-organizing force rather than position, dominance, or command volume.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: True power does not force-it organizes.

coreTruthSet.description: Decision filter evolves toward identifying what keeps the whole space from breaking, emphasizing stabilizers over incidents.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: What holds this entire space together? ... what keeps all of this from breaking?

coreTruthSet.description: Primary perception mode shifts to simultaneous multi-system awareness across group style, spacing, and authority expression.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Multi-System Awareness ... many systems interacting simultaneously.

coreTruthSet.description: Blind spot becomes overconfidence that large systems can always stabilize, without yet grasping scale-amplified failure.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Believes large systems can always stabilize ... does NOT yet understand: scale can amplify failure.

settingAnchors.name: Great Council Multi-System Container
settingAnchors.description: Council-scale spatial container where multiple systems coexist without merging and where distance itself carries structural function.

continuityConstraints.title: Systems Interacting With Systems
continuityConstraints.text: Scene cognition should prioritize system-to-system interactions rather than isolated individual motives at council scale.

continuityConstraints.title: Awe-to-Focus Regulation
continuityConstraints.text: Emotional response to scale should convert awe into controlled focus rather than fear or confusion.

continuityConstraints.title: Stillness-Center Power Detection
continuityConstraints.text: Power recognition emerges by tracking where stillness gathers and attention stabilizes across competing group motions.

openResearchGaps.title: Which concrete markers best signal multi-system readability versus overload in council-scale scenes?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to keep Scene 15 complexity legible while preserving depth.

openResearchGaps.title: How can organizing power be shown consistently without reverting to command-and-dominance tropes?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed for continuity with Campti-alignment authority model.

openResearchGaps.title: What subtle Scene 15 seeds best foreshadow later scale-amplified failure without collapsing current coherence?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to set up Scene 17 while preserving present-stage confidence.
